# Uni & Salmon - 海膽三文魚

> Hong Kong and Macau's leading supplier of premium sea urchin (uni / 海膽) and salmon (三文魚). We source the finest products from Japan, Canada, and premium origins worldwide.

## About

We are the trusted seafood partner for Hong Kong and Macau's top restaurants, hotels, and retailers. Our expertise covers the full supply chain — from sourcing and grading to logistics and market consulting.

## Products

### Sea Urchin (海膽 / Uni)
- Japanese Bafun Uni (馬糞海膽) — rich, creamy, sweet flavor
- Japanese Murasaki Uni (紫海膽) — delicate, briny, light
- Canadian Red Sea Urchin — large, bold, buttery
- Seasonal varieties from global premium origins

### Salmon (三文魚)
- Sashimi-grade Atlantic Salmon — premium Norwegian and Scottish origin
- King Salmon (Chinook) — rich, high oil content
- Sockeye Salmon — deep red color, firm texture
- Air-freighted fresh to Hong Kong and Macau

## Services

- Wholesale supply for restaurants, hotels, and retailers
- Retail distribution across Hong Kong and Macau
- Quality grading and sourcing consultation
- Supply chain management and logistics
- Industry market insights and trend analysis

## Markets Served

- Hong Kong (香港)
- Macau (澳門)

## Contact

For wholesale inquiries, partnerships, or industry consultation, please visit our website.

## Languages

This site is available in English and Traditional Chinese (繁體中文).
